title: Memory Item Contract
description: Typed working/episodic/semantic/procedural memory item shape with distinct authority and retention fields (execution-plan.md Definition of Done item 8 'Four typed memory forms'; layer taxonomy grounded in P230 section 3.3 and the legacy AgenticMemoryLayer union, redesigned neutral per ADR — not copied verbatim). Runtime-neutral. Envelope shape P330; the four layer-specific authority/retention fields below (governingDecisionRef/eventRef/sessionScope/playbookRef, maxAgeSeconds/sequenceOrdinal) are an ADDITIVE P510 extension per ADR-006 — src/memory/memory-item.ts is the layer-conditional enforcement point this schema alone cannot express (no oneOf/if-then in the successor's minimal schema-validator subset).

layer.description: The four canonical agentic memory layers (execution-plan.md section 1.5/5.8).

writer.description: The single code path holding this item's write lock (ADR-006 single-writer mutation-authority per store).

governingDecisionRef.description: P510 additive, semantic-layer-only: the governed decision that authorizes durable promotion to semantic memory (mission bullet 'semantic promotion requires a governing decision'). src/memory/memory-item.ts rejects this field on any non-semantic item and requires it on every semantic item — this schema only declares the field, it does not enforce the layer condition.

eventRef.description: P510 additive, episodic-layer-only: the anchoring event this episode item is derived from.

sessionScope.description: P510 additive, working-layer-only: the session this ephemeral item is bounded to. Never a governing-decision reference — working memory mints no authority (mission bullet 'working does not mint authority').

playbookRef.description: P510 additive, procedural-layer-only: the governed playbook/procedure this item records.

policy.description: archived requires archive-before-remove ordering under the shared manifest lock (ADR-006).

maxAgeSeconds.description: P510 additive, working-layer-only: explicit bound on how long an ephemeral working-memory item may live (MEM-001 'explicit bounded ... representation').

sequenceOrdinal.description: P510 additive, episodic-layer-only: position in the anchoring event's replayable ordering (MEM-002 'replayable ordering').

content.description: Opaque, layer-specific payload. Left open by design: memory content is consumer/task-specific and this contract governs the envelope, not the payload shape.

provenance.description: P530 additive requirement (MEM-007), replacing the prior optional sourceRef/lineageRefs placeholder P510 left unenforced: item-level provenance, required and complete on EVERY memory item regardless of layer (unlike authority/retention's layer-conditional fields). src/memory/memory-item.ts's isWellFormedMemoryItemBase enforces this same six-field completeness at the TypeScript layer (MemoryProvenance is non-optional on every MemoryItem variant) -- a value missing any one field fails both this schema and that runtime guard the same way.

source.description: The upstream origin this item was derived from (e.g. a SIC id, an event id, a raw transcript reference).

session.description: The session that produced this item.

actor.description: The identity of the acting agent/user for THIS write -- may differ from byWhom.identity on a delegated-write path.

transformation.description: The named operation that derived this item (e.g. "second-brain-fold", "manual-authorship", "sic-approval-extract").

governingContract.description: The decision/ADR/contract that authorized persisting this item.

priorState.description: This item's own state immediately before this write, or the literal sentinel "genesis" for a first-ever write -- never absent.
